title: Energy Projection
wikitext:
[[File:Energy Blast.jpg||right|400px]]

== Summary ==
'''Energy Projection''' is a subset of [[Energy Manipulation]] in which the user is able to emit concentrated bursts of energy, most frequently for offensive purposes. The power and flexibility of this ability varies between media, ranging from simple destructive blasts to far more complex usages (i.e. [[Darkseid (Pre-Flashpoint)|Darkseid]] Omega Beams).

== Users ==
* Most [[Dragon Ball]] characters
* Most [[Saint Seiya]] Characters
* Some [[Yu Yu Hakusho]] Characters
* Most [[Asura's Wrath]] Characters
* Many DC Characters, such as [[Superman (Post-Crisis)|Superman]], [[Darkseid (Pre-Flashpoint)|Darkseid]], and [[Superboy-Prime]]
* Virtually every character to bear the [[Mega Man (Franchise)|Mega Man]] title.
